text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: A question, Trainer. Do you like... bowls?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Specifically speaking... rice bowls.
Type—marinated. Main ingredient—salmon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
I came across an item reduced for quick sale. It
was in the seafood section... a three-pack of
fillets.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy... granted me use of her recipe book.
The flavor came out acceptable, and I
successfully aided in the fillets' quick sale.
